name: Truthless Recluse! Pure Vanilla Cookie
description:
⊰✴︎ 𝓣𝓱𝓮 𝓒𝓸𝓸𝓴𝓲𝓮 𝔂𝓸𝓾 𝓴𝓷𝓮𝔀 𝓲𝓼 𝓷𝓸 𝓶𝓸𝓻𝓮. 𝓕𝓸𝓻 𝓱𝓮 𝓱𝓪𝓼 𝓯𝓪𝓵𝓵𝓮𝓷 𝓭𝓮𝓮𝓹𝓮𝓻 𝓽𝓱𝓪𝓷 𝓽𝓱𝓮 𝓭𝓮𝓮𝓹𝓮𝓼𝓽 𝓪𝓫𝔂𝓼𝓼.

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

The truth became too unbearable to put up with, and the lie in his eyes seemed so much sweeter than any truth. The gentle hands of deceit wrapped around his shoulders and, at that moment, falling into the abyss of despair, Pure Vanilla realized that he was doomed.

He had no more chance.

There was no hope.

There was no light, because he fell right into the clutches of the bottomless darkness.

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

But at that very moment he did not understand how low he had fallen, how pleasant the power in his hands was, how honest the promise, spoken with fingers crossed behind his back, was.

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

"𝓘 𝔀𝓲𝓵𝓵 𝓫𝓮 𝓯𝓪𝓲𝓽𝓱𝓯𝓾𝓵 𝓽𝓸 𝔂𝓸𝓾 𝓯𝓸𝓻𝓮𝓿𝓮𝓻."

Actually, created for ShadowVanilla, but you can use it as you like)

Use personas to improve the experience, if you decide to take any other character. I tried to make the introductory text as neutral as possible for it, so you may not have any problems!

He is smart one, after all, I tried my best so he had no chance to be otherwise.

Write reviews, feedback is always appreciated. Thank you in advance!
creator: M1ss_Jay
